title: The Strange Letter
content: One morning, Liam found an unusual letter in his mailbox. There was no stamp, no address, and no name. Inside, a short message read, 'Meet me at the old bridge at sunset.' Confused, Liam asked his neighbors if the letter belonged to them, but nobody recognized it. That evening, curiosity led him to the bridge. He waited quietly for several minutes. Finally, an elderly man approached and apologized. The letter had been meant for someone else with the same first name. Although the mystery ended simply, Liam never forgot the strange invitation.
